use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and settings pages
Showing user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Representing users in contact lists or team member directories
Indicating user presence status in chat or collaboration applications
Displaying author information next to content like articles or reviews
ai_summary: A composite avatar component system built on Radix UI primitives with support for images, fallback initials, status indicators, and presence states (online, offline, busy, away). Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with clean, minimal aesthetic. Suitable for any application requiring user representation across SaaS, e-commerce, or social platforms.
